# Process execution frequency across endpoints (triage)

**Dataset**: `xdr_data`

First-pass triage: how often each binary executed. `event_type = ENUM.PROCESS` (the ENUM literal, not a quoted string), grouped by `actor_process_image_name` (the ACTING process — distinct from `action_process_image_name` = the target/affected process). Sort descending to surface the noisiest, ascending to surface rare ones.

```sql
dataset = xdr_data
| filter event_type = ENUM.PROCESS and actor_process_image_name != null
| comp count() as execs by actor_process_image_name
| sort desc execs
```

_Live-verified on a real XSIAM tenant (narrow 30-min window); measured ~0.0005 CU. Narrow the time window + filter early to keep real-dataset hunts cheap._
